_comment: Plan F — SUBCRITICAL damping nu-sweep. Plan E showed all 4 nu values (1e-3, 1e-2, 1e-1, 1) are SUPERCRITICAL at T0=0.3 (nu_c ≈ 4.5e-4 derived from c=1.5e-4 NVE fit). Plan F uses much smaller nu values to get sustained steady states matching paper PRX 2015 §II.C / Fig 4. Steps increased to 5M = 20000 τ (sufficient time to settle into steady state for the strongest of these subcritical nu).

campaign.notes: Plan F 1/4 — very weak (nu=1e-5 ≈ 0.022 nu_c), expect T_inf ≈ (c/2nu)^(2/3) ≈ 3.86 (T grows from 0.3 to plateau)
Plan F 2/4 — weak (nu=1e-4 ≈ 0.22 nu_c), expect T_inf ≈ 0.83
Plan F 3/4 — near-critical (nu=3e-4 ≈ 0.67 nu_c), expect T_inf ≈ 0.40 ≈ T0
Plan F 4/4 — at-critical (nu=5e-4 ≈ 1.1 nu_c), expect T_inf ~ T0 or slow collapse

aggregation.title: PRX 2015 Plan F — subcritical damping at (phi=0.3, T0=0.3)
